paper.citation_short: Cajigas et al., Journal of Neuroscience Methods (2012)
paper.title: nSTAT: Open-source neural spike train analysis toolbox for Matlab

conditional intensity function (CIF).description: Instantaneous spiking propensity in a point-process model conditioned on stimulus/history/ensemble covariates.

point process generalized linear model (.description: GLM formulation for spike train analysis using point-process likelihood.

maximum likelihood estimation (MLE).description: Parameter estimation framework used for fitting CIF models.

time-rescaling theorem.description: Goodness-of-fit principle used to validate model adequacy for point-process data.

Akaike information criterion (AIC).description: Model comparison criterion used by nSTAT fit summaries.

decoding.description: Reconstructing latent stimulus variables from observed spiking activity.

ensemble / network effects.description: Modeling coupling and interaction structure across multiple neurons.

SignalObjExamples.narrative_focus: Signal representations used as building blocks for CIF modeling workflows.

CovariateExamples.narrative_focus: Construction and manipulation of stimulus/history covariates used by PP-GLM models.

CovCollExamples.narrative_focus: Assembling aligned covariates into matrix form for model fitting.

nSpikeTrainExamples.narrative_focus: Core single-neuron spike train representation and descriptive statistics.

nstCollExamples.narrative_focus: Population-level spike train handling and PSTH-style summaries.

EventsExamples.narrative_focus: Encoding event-aligned structure for use in conditional intensity models.

HistoryExamples.narrative_focus: History basis construction for refractory and post-spike dependence effects.

TrialExamples.narrative_focus: Trial-level integration of spikes and covariates for fitting workflows.

TrialConfigExamples.narrative_focus: Configuration of covariate masks and sampling assumptions used during fitting.

ConfigCollExamples.narrative_focus: Managing competing model configurations for AIC/BIC-based comparison.

AnalysisExamples.narrative_focus: End-to-end model fitting and criterion-based evaluation across neurons.

FitResultExamples.narrative_focus: Inspection of fitted model parameters and diagnostics at single-neuron level.

FitResSummaryExamples.narrative_focus: Aggregated model-comparison summaries across fitted analyses.

PPThinning.narrative_focus: Simulating spike trains from specified CIFs for validation and pedagogy.

PSTHEstimation.narrative_focus: Peri-stimulus rate estimation for quick baseline validation checks.

ValidationDataSet.narrative_focus: Validation datasets that test expected recovery of known generating processes.

mEPSCAnalysis.narrative_focus: mEPSC interval/amplitude modeling as a representative biophysical point-process application.

PPSimExample.narrative_focus: Simulated explicit stimulus/history effects for controlled CIF model validation.

ExplicitStimulusWhiskerData.narrative_focus: Thalamic whisker dataset demonstrating explicit stimulus and history covariates.

HippocampalPlaceCellExample.narrative_focus: Receptive-field style modeling for hippocampal place-cell responses.

DecodingExample.narrative_focus: Univariate stimulus decoding without history terms as baseline decoder.

DecodingExampleWithHist.narrative_focus: Comparison of decoding performance with and without spike-history effects.

StimulusDecode2D.narrative_focus: Bivariate spatial decoding scenario for multi-feature stimulus reconstruction.

NetworkTutorial.narrative_focus: Two-neuron network simulation illustrating ensemble coupling inference.

nSTATPaperExamples.narrative_focus: Compact replay of representative workflows reported in the paper.
